name: Awaiting Dawn
overview: In misty Dalat, young artist Việt arrives at a small homestay to heal from heartbreak, only to meet Dũng, its quiet yet warmhearted owner. Through shared meals, fleeting glances, and gentle moments, their bond deepens amidst lingering sorrows, family burdens, and unspoken pasts. Around them, other tender connections bloom, all under the watchful care of Grandma Thái, who believes in love in every form. In a city where time moves slowly, love, too, finds its way — fragile, tested, but unforgettable.

trailers.title: AWAITING DAWN - CHỜ NGÀY NẮNG LÊN  I  Official Trailer  |  O2 Production
